host.title: Host
host.description: IP address or hostname of the PVS6 on your local network.

serialNumber.title: Serial Number
serialNumber.description: Full PVS6 serial number. The last 5 characters are used as the login password.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to poll the PVS6 for new data. Minimum 5 seconds.

solarName.title: Solar Accessory Display Name
solarName.description: HomeKit display name for the Solar Production accessory.

gridName.title: Grid Accessory Display Name
gridName.description: HomeKit display name for the Grid Meter accessory.
